cards.name: Page of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: ambitious, diligent, goal oriented, planner, consistent, star student, studious, grounded, loyal, faithful, dependable

cards.name: Queen of Cups, reversed
cards.interpretation: insecurity, giving too much, overly-sensitive, needy, fragile, dependence, martyrdom

cards.name: Ⅴ The Hierophant, reversed
cards.interpretation: rebellion, unconventionality, non-conformity, new methods, ignorance
